metadata.title: Postoperative radiotherapy in stage II or IIIA completely resected non-small cell lung cancer: a systematic review and practice guideline.
metadata.study_type: Guideline, Journal Article, Practice Guideline, Research Support, Non-U.S. Gov't, Systematic Review
metadata.text: The Lung Cancer Disease Site Group of Cancer Care Ontario's Program in Evidence-based Care conducted a systematic review of literature published between 1985 and July 2003 and developed an evidence-based clinical practice guideline on postoperative radiotherapy in patients with completely resected pathologic stage II or IIIA non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
